import json

# Parse the context string into a dictionary
signal_data = json.loads(context)

# Extract key information
signal_type = signal_data.get("signal_type")
severity = signal_data.get("severity")
summary = signal_data.get("signal", {}).get("summary")
product_id = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("product_id")
category = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("category")
brand = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("brand")
impact_analysis = signal_data.get("impact_analysis", {}).get("observed_impacts")
root_cause = signal_data.get("root_cause_analysis", {}).get("suspected_root_cause")
recommended_actions = signal_data.get("recommended_actions")
raw_data_sample = signal_data.get("raw_data_sample")

# Format the analysis
analysis_report = {
    "Signal Overview": {
        "Signal ID": signal_data.get("signal_id"),
        "Timestamp": signal_data.get("timestamp"),
        "Source": signal_data.get("source"),
        "Tenant": signal_data.get("tenant"),
        "Signal Type": signal_type,
        "Severity": severity,
        "Summary": summary
    },
    "Affected Entity": {
        "Product ID": product_id,
        "Category": category,
        "Brand": brand,
        "Product Name (from raw data)": raw_data_sample.get("name") if raw_data_sample else "N/A"
    },
    "Impact Analysis": impact_analysis,
    "Root Cause Analysis": root_cause,
    "Recommended Actions": recommended_actions,
    "Raw Data Sample (Key Info)": {
        "Availability Status": raw_data_sample.get("availability_status") if raw_data_sample else "N/A",
        "Last Updated": raw_data_sample.get("last_updated") if raw_data_sample else "N/A"
    }
}

print(json.dumps(analysis_report, indent=2))
FINAL(analysis_report)

import json

# The context string has a prefix "Analyze this signal via REPL: " before the actual JSON.
# Find the start of the JSON object (first '{') and slice the string.
json_start_index = context.find('{')
if json_start_index != -1:
    json_string = context[json_start_index:]
else:
    raise ValueError("Could not find the start of the JSON object in the context string.")

signal_data = json.loads(json_string)

# Extract key information
signal_type = signal_data.get("signal_type")
severity = signal_data.get("severity")
summary = signal_data.get("signal", {}).get("summary")
product_id = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("product_id")
category = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("category")
brand = signal_data.get("catalog_entity", {}).get("brand")
impact_analysis = signal_data.get("impact_analysis", {}).get("observed_impacts")
root_cause = signal_data.get("root_cause_analysis", {}).get("suspected_root_cause")
recommended_actions = signal_data.get("recommended_actions")
raw_data_sample = signal_data.get("raw_data_sample")

# Format the analysis
analysis_report = {
    "Signal Overview": {
        "Signal ID": signal_data.get("signal_id"),
        "Timestamp": signal_data.get("timestamp"),
        "Source": signal_data.get("source"),
        "Tenant": signal_data.get("tenant"),
        "Signal Type": signal_type,
        "Severity": severity,
        "Summary": summary
    },
    "Affected Entity": {
        "Product ID": product_id,
        "Category": category,
        "Brand": brand,
        "Product Name (from raw data)": raw_data_sample.get("name") if raw_data_sample else "N/A"
    },
    "Impact Analysis": impact_analysis,
    "Root Cause Analysis": root_cause,
    "Recommended Actions": recommended_actions,
    "Raw Data Sample (Key Info)": {
        "Availability Status": raw_data_sample.get("availability_status") if raw_data_sample else "N/A",
        "Last Updated": raw_data_sample.get("last_updated") if raw_data_sample else "N/A"
    }
}

print(json.dumps(analysis_report, indent=2))
